validation_cycles.overview: The Testing Strategy agent runs self-validation before declaring completion. Validation ensures acceptance criteria coverage, test level completeness, QA gate definition, and specialized test plans.

category.name: acceptance_criteria_coverage
category.description: All acceptance criteria are mapped to test types.

checks.check: Every acceptance criterion from PRD and user stories has at least one test type.
Traceability matrix is complete (no unmapped criteria).
Critical acceptance criteria have e2e coverage.
Unit test strategy is defined (scope, tools, coverage target).
Integration test strategy is defined (scope, tools, coverage target).
E2E test strategy is defined (scope, tools, critical flows).
Test pyramid is documented with rationale.

category.name: qa_gate_definition
category.description: QA gates are explicit and block deployment.

checks.check: QA gates are listed (e.g., all e2e pass, coverage threshold).
Gates are defined as blocking (deployment cannot proceed when failed).

category.name: performance_test_plan
category.description: Performance testing is addressed when NFRs exist.

checks.check: If PRD or architecture specifies performance NFRs, performance test plan exists.
Performance test scope, tools, and success criteria are defined.
Performance tests are integrated into QA gates where applicable.
If PRD or security plan specifies security requirements, security test plan exists.
Security test scope (e.g., auth, injection, secrets) is defined.
Security tests are integrated into QA gates where applicable.
Accessibility test approach is defined (automated + manual).
Accessibility tests are integrated into QA gates where applicable.

validation_timing.rule: Run self-validation before declaring completion to the hub.
If any check fails, address the issue before reporting complete.
Document any intentional exceptions (e.g., performance test deferred) in testing-strategy.md.
